name: Windrose
description: Windrose Dedicated Server – Piraten-Survival-Adventure mit optionalem Ko-op für bis zu 4 Spieler. Läuft via Proton auf Linux. Server App ID: 4129620.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

## Windrose Dedicated Server Installer
## Install container: ghcr.io/parkervcp/installers:debian

if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo "Steam user not set, using anonymous login."
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
fi

## SteamCMD herunterladen
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## Windrose Dedicated Server (Windows-Only via Wine) installieren
## SteamCMD erst initialisieren (laedt Updates + Config – verhindert 'Missing configuration' beim ersten Run)
./steamcmd.sh +quit

## Windrose Dedicated Server installieren
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformBitness 64 +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} validate +quit

## Steam SDK Libraries einrichten (benoetigt von Wine/SteamAPI)
echo ">>> Richte Steam SDK Libraries ein..."
STEAMCMD_DIR="/mnt/server/steamcmd"

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64

# 32-bit steamclient.so
if [ -f "${STEAMCMD_DIR}/linux32/steamclient.so" ]; then
    cp -v "${STEAMCMD_DIR}/linux32/steamclient.so" /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
    echo "OK SDK32 Library kopiert"
else
    LIB32=$(find "${STEAMCMD_DIR}" -name "steamclient.so" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "32" | head -1)
    if [ -n "${LIB32}" ]; then
        cp -v "${LIB32}" /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
        echo "OK SDK32 Library gefunden (${LIB32}) und kopiert"
    else
        echo "WARN: steamclient.so (32-bit) nicht gefunden in ${STEAMCMD_DIR}"
    fi
fi

# 64-bit steamclient.so
if [ -f "${STEAMCMD_DIR}/linux64/steamclient.so" ]; then
    cp -v "${STEAMCMD_DIR}/linux64/steamclient.so" /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so
    echo "OK SDK64 Library kopiert"
else
    LIB64=$(find "${STEAMCMD_DIR}" -name "steamclient.so" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "64" | head -1)
    if [ -n "${LIB64}" ]; then
        cp -v "${LIB64}" /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so
        echo "OK SDK64 Library gefunden (${LIB64}) und kopiert"
    else
        echo "WARN: steamclient.so (64-bit) nicht gefunden in ${STEAMCMD_DIR}"
    fi
fi

## Standard ServerDescription.json anlegen
SERVER_JSON=/mnt/server/R5/ServerDescription.json
mkdir -p "$(dirname "${SERVER_JSON}")"
if [ ! -f "${SERVER_JSON}" ]; then
    cat > "${SERVER_JSON}" << 'EOF'
{
  "Version": 1,
  "DeploymentId": "",
  "ServerDescription_Persistent": {
    "PersistentServerId": "",
    "InviteCode": "change-me",
    "IsPasswordProtected": false,
    "Password": "",
    "ServerName": "My Windrose Server",
    "WorldIslandId": "",
    "MaxPlayerCount": 4,
    "UserSelectedRegion": "",
    "P2pProxyAddress": "0.0.0.0",
    "UseDirectConnection": false,
    "DirectConnectionServerAddress": "",
    "DirectConnectionServerPort": 7777,
    "DirectConnectionProxyAddress": "0.0.0.0"
  }
}
EOF
fi

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

## Standard ServerDescription.json anlegen
SERVER_JSON=/mnt/server/R5/ServerDescription.json

{

fi

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: App ID des Windrose Dedicated Servers – nicht ändern!

variables.name: Steam Username
variables.description: Steam-Login für SteamCMD (leer lassen für Anonymous)

variables.name: Steam Password
variables.description: Steam-Passwort für SteamCMD (leer lassen für Anonymous)

variables.name: Einladungscode
variables.description: Code den Spieler nutzen um beizutreten (Play → Connect to Server). Mindestens 6 Zeichen, a-z A-Z 0-9, case-sensitive.

variables.name: Server-Passwort
variables.description: Passwort für den Server (nur aktiv wenn Passwort-Schutz aktiviert)

variables.name: Maximale Spieler
variables.description: Maximale Anzahl gleichzeitiger Spieler. Empfohlen: max. 4 für stabile Performance.

variables.name: Server-Region
variables.description: Bevorzugte Region für den Server (EU = Europa, SEA = Südostasien, CIS = GUS-Staaten). Leer lassen für automatische Auswahl.

variables.name: Listener IP
variables.description: Lokale IP-Adresse für Listening Sockets. 0.0.0.0 = alle Interfaces.

changelog: Initial release - Windrose Dedicated Server via Wine on Linux

templates.name: small
templates.label: Kleiner Co-op Server (4 Spieler)
templates.description: Optimierte Einstellungen für 4 Spieler. Beste Stabilität, empfohlene Konfiguration.

templates.name: medium
templates.label: Größerer Server (8 Spieler)
templates.description: Bis zu 8 Spieler – kann die Server-Performance beeinträchtigen, besonders in der Spätphase.

environment.name: XALIA_DISABLE
environment.description: Xalia (Accessibility-UI) deaktivieren – nicht nötig für Headless-Server

environment.name: DISPLAY
environment.description: Virtueller Display für Wine/Proton (headless – leer lassen für headless)

environment.name: PROTON_USE_XALIA
environment.description: Xalia komplett deaktivieren (verhindert 'Video driver not supported' Crash)
